artifact_retention_policy: Retain benchmark logs, manifest validation JSON, and git SHA for at least the peer-review window of the study.

items: Clone the public repository at a tagged release or recorded commit SHA.
Record Python 3.x minor version and whether a virtualenv was used.
Set GOVAI_MODE=ci when reproducing CI-equivalent diagnostics unless the study protocol states otherwise.
checklist_sections.title: Environment capture

items: Run python3 scripts/validate_research_manifest.py --json and store stdout.
Run python3 scripts/research_package_check.py --json and store stdout.
Run make research-package-check and make academic-publication-check when validating publication readiness.
checklist_sections.title: Validation commands

environment_pins.description: Repository commit identifier (prefer signed tags for releases).
Exact command block copied from docs/research/reproducibility.md for the replication cell.

title: GovAI reproducibility checklist
